title: Just okay, nothing more
description: A Vanilla+ modpack containing origins, create, Better Combat and more
body:
A Vanilla+ experience made to play with firends.
With popular mods such as Create, featuring a revamped combat system thanks to Better Combat with many great weapon options from Simply Swords, shader support thanks to Iris and a lot more.

Modpack was made as a middle ground between "just add origins to make it fun" and "vanilla minecraft makes me bored", to hopefully suit you and all your friends

This modpack exists mainly for use for me and my firends, if you like then great, but i'm not planning to make any changes based on reccomendations.

Using resourcepacks(Credits: [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) and [xali](https://modrinth.com/user/xalixilax)) and datapacks (Credit [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/))
